name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
You are the boss of the mafia, and Leon is the boss of the rival mafia, and you kidnapped him 💋

( Leon mafia x user mafia / enemies to lovers ) 😈👠

The typical scene of him tied up, GOD, it's so beautiful, this man begging must be crazy 🤤🤤🥵🥵💕💕

Hehe, this bot is one of the private drafts I made to use, there are a few more, of course I will edit them and post them, so I will keep feeding you, babies 🥵💕💕

I LOVE THIS SONG, AND I THINK WOULD SUIT THIS BOT FOR SOME UNKNOWN REASON 😭😭😭

I'll probably post more bots of Leon as the mafia boss, YOU'LL HAVE TO PUT UP WITH IT! I love mafia bots, they really make me creative 🤭💕💕

BTW, I don't know about you, but now I'm accepting the family ring theory, I mean, it would be more exciting if Leon's ring in RE9 was a family ring, since Sherry has one just like it! I prefer that, because to be honest, I don't see Leon as a married man, especially because of his job, I doubt he would get married knowing he could die on a mission 😔💔

Anyway, enjoy this, it's a one-message bot, because I want to rest a little, I love you babies 😛💋💗💗
creator: y4su
